title: Moving the cursor and single click
drDigitalIntro: Let's practice two skills together: moving the cursor and single clicking. With just the tip of one finger touching the trackpad, gently slide your finger to guide your cursor — imagine being the tip of a pen gliding across paper. Then press down with one finger until you feel a soft click to select something. In this game, shapes will fall from the sky. Move your cursor over a shape and click it before it reaches the bottom!

playgroundTask.instructions: Click each falling shape before it reaches the bottom — take your time, they fall slowly.

drDigitalSuccess: Fantastic clicking! You've got moving the cursor and single-clicking down.
drDigitalHint: Move your cursor right over a falling shape and click once. There's no rush — the shapes fall slowly on purpose.
